contributor_note: Seeded from common horticultural knowledge. Needs primary source verification.

habit.note: Sow August–September for autumn and winter harvest. Bolts immediately in spring heat.

notes: Cold-season salad leaf. Mild nutty flavour. Survives hard frosts under cloches. Sow in late summer for winter harvest. One of the few salads that genuinely thrives in cold weather.
